sprint: Doodle Pen Circles, Add Something Grid, Selection Back Button, Transparent Shape Fill
task: Four rapid follow-ups landed together. (1) 'change these into sketch pens... try circular' -- Doodle Pen Colour swatches/Thickness buttons were real <button> elements caught by the global button{width:100%;height:var(--button-height)} cascade bug (same class already fixed once for .object-card/the Publish Studio close button), stretching each swatch into a full-width oval; fixed with !important width/height/margin overrides + flex-shrink:0, restoring true fixed circles with a soft inset-gradient pen-tip look. (2) 'organise this better' (Add Something accordion) -- the stacked full-width .context-add-item list is replaced with a 3-column .context-add-grid of icon cards (.context-add-card), mirroring the existing .icon-card/.context-shape-tile visual language; the combined Sticker/Decoration label shortened to 'Stickers & Decor' to fit. (3) 'need back button to go to previous selection' -- js/contextPanel.js gained a real selection-history stack (_selectionHistory, capped 20) recording the state left on every genuine selection change, with a _navigatingBack flag preventing Back's own transition from re-pushing itself; a quiet Back pill renders above the Status pill whenever real history exists, popping and re-applying the prior selection via the existing PageRuntime.selectSceneObject/selectTextObject/clearSelection channels. (4) 'for all shapes give option of transparent fill color' -- the separate Fill Shape on/off toggle is replaced by a Transparent checkbox beside Fill Colour (mirroring the Universal Experience Authoring Colour-section pattern), same underlying fillEnabled field; Colour/Opacity now stay visible but dimmed (.is-transparent) instead of hidden outright while transparent. Verified via a new consolidated Playwright test (four_fixes_test.js) plus full regression across the existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform suite -- doodle_test.js/shape_multistroke_test.js/add_something_combined_test.js/right_panel_redesign_test.js had stale selectors updated to match; sticker_owner_check.js/frame_variation_test.js confirmed pre-existing failures via git stash against the unmodified baseline. Both goldenBuild.js suites pass unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change.
